page_metadata.biotools__summary: A webserver for carrying out sequence and structure based analysis of Polyketide Synthases, an important family of multifunctional megasynthases involved in the biosynthesis of a variety of pharmaceutically important secondary metabolites.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A webserver for carrying out sequence and structure based analysis of Polyketide Synthases, an important family of multifunctional megasynthases involved in the biosynthesis of a variety of pharmaceutically important secondary metabolites.
